data.content: Second OpenCode harness follow-up: OpenCode HTTP message model payload must be an object, not a string. Added parseOpenCodeModelSelection so openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.1 is sent as { providerID: openrouter, modelID: z-ai/glm-5.1 }. Commit 7ec5b3bf pushed to origin/main and branch. Re-verified lint, typecheck, unit tests, build, dry approval helper checks, and git diff --check.
